name: limit
label: Limit
help: Max items to return. Default 50, max 500. Billed per result.

name: fast
label: Fast
help: Set true to use YouTube RSS for faster results with less detailed metadata. Leave false when viewCount/duration quality matters.

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Responses are cached for 24 hours by default. Set false to bypass the cache and always fetch fresh data (default true).
